name: SenseNova U1-Fast
description: SenseNova U1-Fast via token.sensenova.cn. Moderate fidelity — colors mostly follow, but Style Lock text may render in image and aspect_ratio is ignored.

size.notes: Must specify exact pixel dimensions. --resolution and --aspect_ratio flags are silently ignored.

prompt_rendering.notes: Style Lock text may render as visible text. Use bracket-wrapped context. Hex values mostly follow. Rate limits: ~10 req/min burst, ~300/day.
